page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance featuring 96 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8163 processors operating at 2.5 GHz. The system architecture is x86_64, supported by 372.0 GB of system memory, which equates to 3.88 GB per core. Acceleration is delivered via four NVIDIA Turing T4 GPUs, providing a combined total of 64 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include local storage and relies on network-attached storage, while offering a baseline network bandwidth of 30 Gbps.

Benchmark data reveals a clear contrast between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core CPU performance is weak, ranking in the bottom 25% with a stress-ng score of 1103.89, and single-threaded gzip compression is poor at 19.2 GB/sec. Conversely, multi-core CPU performance is strong, placing in the top 25% with a stress-ng score of 70574.45. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression also ranks in the top 25% at 287.37 GB/sec. Memory bandwidth for small cached blocks is strong at 3924.63 GB/sec, though large-block uncached read and write bandwidths fall into the average category. Redis SET operations perform strongly, achieving 64.27 million operations per second.

The qualitative cost efficiency of this instance lies in its high density of GPU and CPU resources, making it suitable for parallelized workloads despite its lower single-core efficiency. The lack of local storage requires external storage configuration, which is a key architectural tradeoff. Given the hardware profile and benchmark results, this server is designed for multi-threaded workloads, GPU-accelerated parallel processing, Redis caching layers, and high-throughput web serving, rather than single-threaded computation.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz, 372.0 GB of system memory, and four NVIDIA Turing T4 GPUs with 64 GB of total VRAM. Operating on the x86_64 architecture under a KVM hypervisor, this instance lacks local storage but provides a 30 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks indicate weak single-core CPU execution and poor single-threaded compression, contrasted by strong multi-core CPU performance and high multi-threaded decompression speeds. Memory bandwidth for small cached blocks is strong, and Redis SET operations reach 64.27 million operations per second. This hardware profile is optimized for parallelized, multi-threaded workloads, GPU-accelerated computing, and high-throughput caching applications rather than single-threaded tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server with 96 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 372 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA T4 GPUs. It features strong multi-core performance and 30 Gbps network bandwidth.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server with 96 Intel vCPUs, 372 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA T4 GPUs for parallel workloads.
tagline: A multi-GPU accelerated server featuring ninety-six dedicated cores and sixty-four gigabytes of total video memory for parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: Ninety-six dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 372 GB of system memory
Four NVIDIA Turing T4 GPUs providing 64 GB of total VRAM
Strong multi-core CPU and multi-threaded decompression performance
Baseline network bandwidth of 30 Gbps with no local storage
High-throughput Redis performance reaching 64.27 million operations per second
